query:
SELECT 
  mi.id,
  mi.name,
  ROUND(mi.price / 100, 2) AS price_reais,
  mc.name AS category_name
FROM menu_items mi
LEFT JOIN menu_categories mc ON mi.categoryId = mc.id
WHERE mi.imageUrl IS NULL OR mi.imageUrl = ''
ORDER BY mc.displayOrder, mi.name;
